teams.name: Seattle Mariners
headlines: Mariners fall to Padres 4-1 in series opener at Petco Park
Jackie Robinson Day celebrated across MLB - players wear #42
Rob Refsnyder placed on paternity list, Patrick Wisdom called up
Julio Rodríguez picks up videography hobby following in footsteps of Griffey, Johnson
Bryan Woo still seeking first win despite 2.16 ERA through four starts

details.keyUpdates: Rob Refsnyder placed on paternity list; Patrick Wisdom recalled from minors. Emerson Hancock scheduled to start today vs Padres.
details.situation: Early season struggles continue with inconsistent offense. Woo has received minimal run support despite strong pitching performances.
details.playoffPicture: Too early in season for playoff standings. Mariners considered contenders with 18% implied probability on 2026 AL Champion market (2nd behind Yankees).
details.achievement: Jackie Robinson Day observance across organization
details.today: Game 2 of 3-game series at San Diego Padres - Emerson Hancock on the mound
details.nextMatch: April 17-19: 3-game series at Los Angeles Angels

teams.name: Seattle Seahawks
headlines: Seahawks to begin voluntary offseason program on April 20
Sam Darnold married Katie Hoofnagle on April 3, 2026
Team coming off Super Bowl LX championship victory
Chris Shaheed re-signs with Seattle after championship run
Jaxon Smith-Njigba in line for massive contract extension

details.keyUpdates: Voluntary offseason program begins April 20. Super Bowl champions preparing for title defense.
details.situation: Coming off Super Bowl LX victory. Key receivers Smith-Njigba and Cooper Kupp ($13.5M in 2026) form expensive receiver room for run-first team.
details.playoffPicture: Defending Super Bowl champions entering 2026 season

teams.name: Seattle Kraken
headlines: Kraken lose 4-1 to Golden Knights, Vegas clinches Pacific Division
Team set to miss playoffs for 4th time in 5 years
CEO Tod Leiweke declares start of 'on season' - not offseason
GM Jason Botterill takes full control after Ron Francis departure
Final game tonight vs Colorado Avalanche at Ball Arena

details.keyUpdates: Ron Francis out as president of hockey ops; Jason Botterill now leads as GM without president above him. Organization conducting full audit.
details.situation: Missed playoffs for 4th time in 5 years. Finished in bottom 8 of NHL. Joining Blackhawks as only teams in bottom eight for multiple seasons.
details.playoffPicture: Eliminated from playoff contention. Season ends April 16.
details.today: Final game of season at Colorado Avalanche (10:00 PM ET at Ball Arena)

teams.name: Seattle Sounders FC
headlines: Sounders eliminated from CONCACAF Champions Cup on away goals tiebreaker
3-3 aggregate draw with Tigres UANL ends continental campaign
Albert Rusnák scores twice in valiant 3-1 second leg victory
Danny Musovski also scores but Tigres advance on away goals rule
Tigres to face Nashville SC in semifinals

details.keyUpdates: Eliminated from Champions Cup quarterfinals. Lost 2-0 in first leg at Mexico, won 3-1 at home but Tigres advance on away goals (3-3 aggregate).
details.situation: Continental campaign ends in quarterfinals. Strong second leg performance not enough to overcome first leg deficit.
details.playoffPicture: Out of CONCACAF Champions Cup. Focus returns to MLS regular season.
details.today: No match - recovering from midweek Champions Cup exit

teams.name: Washington Huskies
headlines: Huskies football practiced at Seahawks VMAC facility Tuesday
Men's basketball sees major roster turnover - German star to NBA, second-leading scorer transfers to SEC
Football spring practice #7 highlighted by defense leading offense
Freshman QBs Derek Zammit and Demond Williams taking turns in practice
UW Softball sweeping Gophers in weekly action

details.keyUpdates: Football team held practice at Seahawks' Virginia Mason Athletic Center. Men's basketball losing key players to NBA and transfer portal.
details.situation: Football: Defense ahead of offense in spring practice. Basketball: Major roster rebuild with four new starters expected next season.
details.playoffPicture: Football preparing for 2026 season in Big Ten. Basketball facing rebuild.
details.achievement: Football: Innovative practice location at VMAC. Softball sweeping Minnesota.
details.nextMatch: Football: Spring Game TBD; Basketball: Offseason

last_game.note: Spring practice period - no recent games
